Rhynchosia galactioides is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, specifically belonging to the genus Rhynchosia. It is classified as a member of the subfamily Faboideae. The plant is native to tropical Africa and is often found in grasslands and savannas. Rhynchosia galactioides is further classified within the tribe Phaseoleae, which includes other leguminous plants. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant within its family.
